title: festuca iberica subsp. subscabra
intro: Festuca iberica subsp. subscabra, also known as Iberian fescue, is a plant species in the genus Festuca, which is a type of grass. Traditionally, Iberian fescue has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iberian fescue include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Iberian fescue can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile plant for herbal remedies.
